meta.name: EnviroArmour
meta.description: Protective enclosure for indoor and outdoor equipment
meta.heroDescription:
Polycarbonate and fiberglass enclosures designed to protect electronic equipment from environmental exposure, impact and unauthorised access.

Available in multiple sizes with transparent or solid doors and integrated mounting plate.

Suitable for fire alarm control panels, remote annunciators and other sensitive electronic equipment requiring protected indoor or outdoor installation.
